visualizerParams.title: Adler-32 Modulo Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The Adler-32 checksum calculation seems incorrect. The modular arithmetic is not correctly applied to both parts. Identify and fix the logic flaw.

solution.explanation: The checksum component `a` was missing the modulo operation inside the loop. Without it, `a` can grow very large and overflow or cause incorrect values when calculating `b` and the final result.
